summary: Alternatively, the character can spend one Edge point

mechanics.name_guess: Alternatively, the character can spend one Edge point
mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 020 > npcs > Alternatively, the character can spend one Edge point
mechanics.excerpt: Alternatively, the character can spend one Edge point to completely reroll the die result: While this might seem like bet- ter option_ the second result stands even if it is worse than the first, and Edge cannot be spent on the second die roll at all: However; this use of Edge does give you useful second chance your roll was way off the mark: The use of Edge to affect die roll already made must be announced and resolved immediately after the die roll made_ Once ay other die rolls have been made Edge can no longer be used.
